brief_justification: Arrives at (B) with valid SCP-as-ceiling reasoning; explains the hierarchy evaluation requirement and why IAM can't override SCP, but stops at one explanatory layer without tracing second-order effects; no explicit monitoring of own reasoning process, naming of biases, or assumption-checking at any point; no counterfactual tests or boundary-condition checks are applied; states conclusions confidently without acknowledging edge cases or what conditions would alter the result; implicitly rejects (A) and (C) but never systematically addresses all distractors or explains why (D) is wrong; most steps are shown and a third party could follow the chain, but the setup conditions (e.g., explicit-deny-overrides-allow rule) are stated rather than derived
